API docs by Redocly

Jump Stop Pivot Basketball API (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

API Support: support@jumpstoppivot.com URL: https://jumpstoppivot.com/support License: MIT Terms of Service

API for managing basketball leagues, teams, players, and games

Coffee

Create donation checkout

Creates a Stripe-hosted checkout session for the chosen donation tier. Returns the session URL. No authentication required.

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Donation request

cancelUrl
string
successUrl
string
tierId
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/coffee/checkout

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "cancelUrl": "string",
  • "successUrl": "string",
  • "tierId": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "sessionUrl": "string"
}

List donation tiers

Returns all available donation tiers. No authentication required.

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/coffee/tiers

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tiers": [
    • {
      • "amountCents": 0,
      • "currency": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "label": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Donations Stripe webhook

Receives Stripe webhook events for donation checkouts. Authenticated via Stripe-Signature header.

header Parameters
Stripe-Signature
required
string

Stripe webhook signature

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/coffee/webhook

Credits

Get credit summary

Returns the current credit balance plus free-tier consumption counters (leagues, player cards, game events).

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/credits

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "balance": 0,
    • "freeTierGameEvents": 0,
    • "freeTierLeague": 0,
    • "freeTierPlayerProfileCard": 0,
    • "gameEvents": 0,
    • "league": 0,
    • "playerProfileCard": 0
    },
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Get credit balance

Returns the current credit balance for the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/credits/balance

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "balance": 0,
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Create credits checkout

Creates a Stripe-hosted checkout session for the specified credit package. Returns the session URL to redirect the user.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Package ID and redirect URLs

cancelUrl
string
packageId
string
successUrl
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/credits/checkout

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "cancelUrl": "string",
  • "packageId": "string",
  • "successUrl": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "sessionUrl": "string"
}

List credit packages

Returns all available credit packages (Starter, Season, Association) with pricing.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/credits/packages

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "packages": [
    • {
      • "creditAmount": 0,
      • "currency": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "priceCents": 0
      }
    ]
}

Get credit transactions

Returns the full credit transaction history for the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/credits/transactions

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "transactions": [
    • {
      • "amount": 0,
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "reason": "string",
      • "stripeSessionId": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Credits Stripe webhook

Receives Stripe webhook events for credit purchases. Authenticated via Stripe-Signature header, not Firebase.

header Parameters
Stripe-Signature
required
string

Stripe webhook signature

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/credits/webhook

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
"string"

Games

Create a game

Creates a new game in a league. Optionally link home and away teams.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Game details

awayScore
integer
awayTeamId
string
dateTime
string
description
string
homeScore
integer
homeTeamId
string
leagueId
string
location
string
name
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "awayScore": 0,
  • "awayTeamId": "string",
  • "dateTime": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "homeScore": 0,
  • "homeTeamId": "string",
  • "leagueId": "string",
  • "location": "string",
  • "name": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 402
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "id": "string",
  • "message": "string"
}

Delete a game

Permanently removes a game. Only the owner can delete.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Get a game

Returns a single game by its ID.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "game": {
    • "awayScore": 0,
    • "awayTeamId": "string",
    • "awayTeamName": "string",
    • "createdAt": "string",
    • "dateTime": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "homeScore": 0,
    • "homeTeamId": "string",
    • "homeTeamName": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "leagueId": "string",
    • "leagueName": "string",
    • "location": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "statsEnabled": true,
    • "updatedAt": "string",
    • "userRole": "string"
    },
  • "message": "string"
}

Update a game

Updates fields of an existing game. Setting statsEnabled=false signals game completion.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Updated game fields

awayScore
integer
awayTeamId
string
dateTime
string
description
string
homeScore
integer
homeTeamId
string
location
string
name
string
statsEnabled
boolean

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "awayScore": 0,
  • "awayTeamId": "string",
  • "dateTime": "string",
  • "description": "string",
  • "homeScore": 0,
  • "homeTeamId": "string",
  • "location": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "statsEnabled": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Generate share link

Creates a JWT-based share token for a game. Only owners and editors can generate links.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json

Role for the share token (default: share-token)

role
string

share-token (default) or editor

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/share-link

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "role": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "expiresAt": "string",
  • "message": "string",
  • "token": "string"
}

List game sharing

Returns all users with shared access to a game.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/sharing

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "sharings": [
    • {
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "firebaseUid": "string",
      • "gameId": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "role": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Share a game

Grants access to a game for another user by Firebase UID.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Share request (firebaseUid + role)

firebaseUid
string
role
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/sharing

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "firebaseUid": "string",
  • "role": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Remove game sharing

Removes shared access for a specific user from a game.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

firebaseUid
required
string

Firebase UID of the user to remove

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/sharing/{firebaseUid}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

List active league games

Returns paginated games from leagues with status 'active'. No authentication required.

query Parameters
page
integer

Page number (default 1)

limit
integer

Page size (default 10)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/active

Response samples

  • 200
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "games": [
    • {
      • "awayScore": 0,
      • "awayTeamId": "string",
      • "awayTeamName": "string",
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "dateTime": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "homeScore": 0,
      • "homeTeamId": "string",
      • "homeTeamName": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "leagueName": "string",
      • "location": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "statsEnabled": true,
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "leagueId": "string",
  • "leagueName": "string",
  • "limit": 0,
  • "message": "string",
  • "nextPage": 0,
  • "page": 0,
  • "skip": 0,
  • "totalPages": 0,
  • "totalResults": 0
}

List all games

Returns paginated list of all games. No authentication required.

query Parameters
page
integer

Page number (default 1)

limit
integer

Page size (default 10)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/all

Response samples

  • 200
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "games": [
    • {
      • "awayScore": 0,
      • "awayTeamId": "string",
      • "awayTeamName": "string",
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "dateTime": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "homeScore": 0,
      • "homeTeamId": "string",
      • "homeTeamName": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "leagueName": "string",
      • "location": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "statsEnabled": true,
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "leagueId": "string",
  • "leagueName": "string",
  • "limit": 0,
  • "message": "string",
  • "nextPage": 0,
  • "page": 0,
  • "skip": 0,
  • "totalPages": 0,
  • "totalResults": 0
}

Search games

Searches games by name for the authenticated user. Requires ?q= query parameter.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
query Parameters
q
required
string

Search query

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/search

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "games": [
    • {
      • "awayScore": 0,
      • "awayTeamId": "string",
      • "awayTeamName": "string",
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "dateTime": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "homeScore": 0,
      • "homeTeamId": "string",
      • "homeTeamName": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "leagueName": "string",
      • "location": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "statsEnabled": true,
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "leagueId": "string",
  • "leagueName": "string",
  • "limit": 0,
  • "message": "string",
  • "nextPage": 0,
  • "page": 0,
  • "skip": 0,
  • "totalPages": 0,
  • "totalResults": 0
}

List stats-enabled games

Returns paginated games from active leagues where stats recording is enabled, ordered by date descending.

query Parameters
page
integer

Page number (default 1)

limit
integer

Page size (default 10)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/stats-enabled

Response samples

  • 200
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "games": [
    • {
      • "awayScore": 0,
      • "awayTeamId": "string",
      • "awayTeamName": "string",
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "dateTime": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "homeScore": 0,
      • "homeTeamId": "string",
      • "homeTeamName": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "leagueName": "string",
      • "location": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "statsEnabled": true,
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "leagueId": "string",
  • "leagueName": "string",
  • "limit": 0,
  • "message": "string",
  • "nextPage": 0,
  • "page": 0,
  • "skip": 0,
  • "totalPages": 0,
  • "totalResults": 0
}

Get user's games

Returns paginated games owned by or shared with the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
query Parameters
page
integer

Page number (default 1)

limit
integer

Page size (default 10)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/user

  • 500

Get league games

Returns paginated games for a specific league.

path Parameters
leagueId
required
string

League ID (UUID)

query Parameters
page
integer

Page number (default 1)

limit
integer

Page size (default 10)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues/{leagueId}/games

  • 200
  • 400
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "games": [
    • {
      • "awayScore": 0,
      • "awayTeamId": "string",
      • "awayTeamName": "string",
      • "createdAt": "string",

      • "description": "string",

      • "homeTeamName": "string",

      • "userRole": "string"
      }

}

Get league standings

Computes and returns team standings (W/L/PF/PA/Win%) from game results for a league.

path Parameters
leagueId
required
string

League ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues/{leagueId}/standings

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "standings": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "losses": 0,
      • "played": 0,
      • "pointDifferential": 0,
      • "pointsAgainst": 0,
      • "pointsFor": 0,
      • "position": 0,
      • "team": "string",
      • "winPercentage": 0,
      • "wins": 0
      }
    ]
}

GameStats

Delete coach bench stats

Deletes all coach/bench stats for a game. Only owners can delete.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/coach-bench-stats

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Get coach bench stats

Returns the coach/bench stats snapshot (period fouls, timeouts, possession) for a game.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/coach-bench-stats

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "stats": {
    • "entries": [
      • {
        • "awayTechnicalFouls": 0,
        • "homeTechnicalFouls": 0,
        • "period": 0,
        • "periodStats": [
          • {
            • "awayFouls": 0,
            • "awayTimeOuts": 0,
            • "homeFouls": 0,
            • "homeTimeOuts": 0,
            • "period": 0
            }
          ],
        • "possessionArrow": "string"
        }
      ],
    • "gameId": "string",
    • "updatedAt": "string"
    }
}

Merge coach bench stats

Merges period-level coach/bench stats into the existing snapshot. Owner or editor required.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Coach bench stats to merge

Array of objects (internal_league.GameCoachBenchStatEntry)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/coach-bench-stats

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "entries": [
    • {
      • "awayTechnicalFouls": 0,
      • "homeTechnicalFouls": 0,
      • "period": 0,
      • "periodStats": [
        • {
          • "awayFouls": 0,
          • "awayTimeOuts": 0,
          • "homeFouls": 0,
          • "homeTimeOuts": 0,
          • "period": 0
          }
        ],
      • "possessionArrow": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Upsert coach bench stats

Replaces the full coach/bench stats snapshot for a game (period fouls, timeouts, possession arrow). Owner or editor required.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Coach bench stats snapshot

Array of objects (internal_league.GameCoachBenchStatEntry)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/coach-bench-stats

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "entries": [
    • {
      • "awayTechnicalFouls": 0,
      • "homeTechnicalFouls": 0,
      • "period": 0,
      • "periodStats": [
        • {
          • "awayFouls": 0,
          • "awayTimeOuts": 0,
          • "homeFouls": 0,
          • "homeTimeOuts": 0,
          • "period": 0
          }
        ],
      • "possessionArrow": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Get game players

Returns home and away team players for a game. Also accessible via share token.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/players

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "awayPlayers": [
    • {
      • "assistsPerGame": 0,
      • "blocksPerGame": 0,
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "foulsPerGame": 0,
      • "gamesPlayed": 0,
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "leagueName": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "number": 0,
      • "photoUrl": "string",
      • "pointsPerGame": 0,
      • "position": "string",
      • "reboundsPerGame": 0,
      • "seasons": [
        • {
          • "apg": 0,
          • "bpg": 0,
          • "fgPct": 0,
          • "ftPct": 0,
          • "gamesPlayed": 0,
          • "league": "string",
          • "leagueId": "string",
          • "ppg": 0,
          • "rpg": 0,
          • "season": "string",
          • "spg": 0,
          • "team": "string",
          • "teamId": "string",
          • "threePct": 0
          }
        ],
      • "stealsPerGame": 0,
      • "teamId": "string",
      • "teamName": "string",
      • "turnoversPerGame": 0,
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "error": true,
  • "homePlayers": [
    • {
      • "assistsPerGame": 0,
      • "blocksPerGame": 0,
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "foulsPerGame": 0,
      • "gamesPlayed": 0,
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "leagueName": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "number": 0,
      • "photoUrl": "string",
      • "pointsPerGame": 0,
      • "position": "string",
      • "reboundsPerGame": 0,
      • "seasons": [
        • {
          • "apg": 0,
          • "bpg": 0,
          • "fgPct": 0,
          • "ftPct": 0,
          • "gamesPlayed": 0,
          • "league": "string",
          • "leagueId": "string",
          • "ppg": 0,
          • "rpg": 0,
          • "season": "string",
          • "spg": 0,
          • "team": "string",
          • "teamId": "string",
          • "threePct": 0
          }
        ],
      • "stealsPerGame": 0,
      • "teamId": "string",
      • "teamName": "string",
      • "turnoversPerGame": 0,
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "message": "string"
}

Delete game stats

Deletes all player stats for a game. Only owners can delete.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/stats

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Get game stats

Returns the complete player stats snapshot for a game. Also accessible via share token.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/stats

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "stats": {
    • "entries": [
      • {
        • "assists": 0,
        • "blocks": 0,
        • "flagrantFouls": 0,
        • "fouls": 0,
        • "playerId": "string",
        • "playerName": "string",
        • "playerNumber": 0,
        • "points": 0,
        • "rebounds": 0,
        • "steals": 0,
        • "technicalFouls": 0,
        • "turnovers": 0
        }
      ],
    • "gameId": "string",
    • "updatedAt": "string"
    }
}

Merge game stats

Applies field-level deltas to the existing stats. Only provided fields are updated; other entries are preserved. Owner or editor required.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Stats deltas to apply

Array of objects (internal_league.GameStatDelta)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/stats

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "deltas": [
    • {
      • "assists": 0,
      • "blocks": 0,
      • "flagrantFouls": 0,
      • "fouls": 0,
      • "playerId": "string",
      • "playerName": "string",
      • "playerNumber": 0,
      • "points": 0,
      • "rebounds": 0,
      • "steals": 0,
      • "technicalFouls": 0,
      • "turnovers": 0
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Upsert game stats

Replaces the full player stats snapshot for a game. Owner or editor access required. Also accepts share tokens.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Game ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Full stats snapshot

Array of objects (internal_league.GameStatEntry)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/games/{id}/stats

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "entries": [
    • {
      • "assists": 0,
      • "blocks": 0,
      • "flagrantFouls": 0,
      • "fouls": 0,
      • "playerId": "string",
      • "playerName": "string",
      • "playerNumber": 0,
      • "points": 0,
      • "rebounds": 0,
      • "steals": 0,
      • "technicalFouls": 0,
      • "turnovers": 0
      }
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Get player game history

Returns the per-game stats history for a player across all games they participated in.

path Parameters
id
required
string

Player ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/players/{id}/games

  • 400
  • 404
  • 500

application/json

      • "awayScore": 0,
      • "awayTeamName": "string",

      • "homeTeamName": "string",
      • "points": 0,
      • "rebounds": 0,
      • "steals": 0,
      • "technicalFouls": 0,
      • "turnovers": 0
      }
    ],
  • "message": "string"
}

Integrations

List integrations

Returns all integrations registered under the authenticated user's account.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/integrations

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "integrations": [
    • {
      • "active": true,
      • "clientId": "string",
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "lastUsedAt": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "scopes": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "updatedAt": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Register integration

Registers a new third-party integration. Returns a clientId and one-time clientSecret.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Integration details

name
string
scopes
Array of strings

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/integrations

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "scopes": [
    • "string"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "active": true,
  • "clientId": "string",
  • "clientSecret": "string",
  • "createdAt": "string",
  • "id": "string",
  • "lastUsedAt": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "scopes": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "updatedAt": "string"
}

Revoke integration

Permanently revokes an integration. Its Firebase UID is disabled immediately.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Integration ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/integrations/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "string"
}

Get integration token

Exchanges clientId and clientSecret for a Firebase idToken + refreshToken. No auth required.

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Client credentials

clientId
string
clientSecret
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/integrations/token

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "clientId": "string",
  • "clientSecret": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expiresIn": 0,
  • "idToken": "string",
  • "refreshToken": "string"
}

Provision end user

Finds or creates a JSP account for the given email and returns a Firebase idToken + refreshToken. Requires an integration token.

Request Body schema: application/json
required

User details

email
string
name
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/integrations/users/provision

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "name": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expiresIn": 0,
  • "idToken": "string",
  • "isNewUser": true,
  • "refreshToken": "string"
}

Leagues

Get user's leagues

Returns paginated leagues owned by or shared with the authenticated user. Filter by status with the optional ?status= query param.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
query Parameters
page
integer

Page number (default 1)

limit
integer

Page size (default 10)

status
string

Filter by league status (e.g. active)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "leagues": [
    • {
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "season": "string",
      • "startDate": "string",
      • "status": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "limit": 0,
  • "message": "string",
  • "nextPage": 0,
  • "page": 0,
  • "skip": 0,
  • "totalPages": 0,
  • "totalResults": 0
}

Create a league

Creates a new basketball league owned by the authenticated user. Consumes credits beyond the free tier.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

League details

description
string
name
string
season
string
startDate
string
status
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "description": "string",
  • "name": "string",
  • "season": "string",
  • "startDate": "string",
  • "status": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 402
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "id": "string",
  • "message": "string"
}

Permanently removes a league. Only the owner can delete.

FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

League ID (UUID)

Responses

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 500

application/json

  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

id
required
string

Get league players

Returns paginated list of players in all teams of a league.

path Parameters
id
required
string

League ID (UUID)

query Parameters
page
integer

Page number (default 1)

limit
integer

Page size (default 10)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues/{id}/players

  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json

  • "limit": 0,
  • "message": "string",
  • "nextPage": 0,

  • "players": [
    • {
      • "assistsPerGame": 0,
      • "blocksPerGame": 0,
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "foulsPerGame": 0,
      • "gamesPlayed": 0,
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "leagueName": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "number": 0,

          • "bpg": 0,
          • "fgPct": 0,
          • "ftPct": 0,

          • "threePct": 0
          }
        ],
      • "stealsPerGame": 0,
      • "teamId": "string",
      • "teamName": "string",
      • "turnoversPerGame": 0,
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "skip": 0,
  • "team": {
    • "leagueId": "string",
    • "leagueName": "string",
    • "photoUrl": "string",
    • "teamId": "string",
    • "teamName": "string"
    },
  • "totalPages": 0,
  • "totalResults": 0
}

Import players from CSV

Imports players from a multipart CSV upload. Required CSV column: name. Optional: number, position, team.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

League ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: multipart/form-data
required
file
required
string <binary>

CSV file with player data

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues/{id}/players/import

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "errors": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "imported": 0,
  • "message": "string",
  • "skipped": 0
}

List league sharing

Returns all users with shared access to a league.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

League ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues/{id}/sharing

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json

  • "message": "string",

    • {
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "email": "string",
      • "firebaseUid": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "role": "string"
      }
    ]
}

Share a league

Grants access to a league for another user by email address.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

League ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Share request (email + role)

email
string
role
string

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues/{id}/sharing

  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Remove league sharing

Removes shared access for a specific user from a league.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

League ID (UUID)

firebaseUID
required
string

Firebase UID of the user to remove

Responses

  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Returns the top 5 players per stat category (points, rebounds, assists, steals, blocks, turnovers) for a league.

path Parameters
id
required
string

League ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues/{id}/stat-leaders

  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json

          • "gamesPlayed": 0,
          • "name": "string",
          • "photoUrl": "string",
          • "playerId": "string",
          • "rank": 0,
          • "teamId": "string",
          • "teamName": "string",
          • "value": 0
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string"
}

Quick game setup

Creates a league (optional), home team, away team, and a game in a single transaction. Provide IDs for existing entities or names to create new ones.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Quick game request

awayTeamId
string
awayTeamName
string
gameName
string
homeTeamId
string
homeTeamName
string
leagueId
string
leagueName
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/leagues/quick-game

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "awayTeamId": "string",
  • "awayTeamName": "string",
  • "gameName": "string",
  • "homeTeamId": "string",
  • "homeTeamName": "string",
  • "leagueId": "string",
  • "leagueName": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "result": {
    • "awayPlayerIds": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "awayTeamId": "string",
    • "createdAwayTeam": true,
    • "createdHomeTeam": true,
    • "createdLeague": true,
    • "gameId": "string",
    • "homePlayerIds": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "homeTeamId": "string",
    • "leagueId": "string"
    }
}

query Parameters
q
required
string

Metrics

Returns platform-wide aggregate counts: total games, leagues, players, and teams.

Responses

  • 500

application/json

    • "totalGames": 0,
    • "totalLeagues": 0,
    • "totalPlayers": 0,
    • "totalTeams": 0
    }
}

      }

    • "photoUrl": "string",
    • "teamId": "string",
    • "teamName": "string"
    },
  • "totalPages": 0,
  • "totalResults": 0
}

Creates a new player, optionally linking them to a team and league.

id
required
string

FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

id

Claim player profile

Links a player profile to the authenticated user's account. Only one claim per player. Consumes credits beyond the free tier.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Player ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/players/{id}/claim

    • "id": "string",

    },

path Parameters
id
required

id

integer

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
query Parameters
q
required
string

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/teams/search

  • 200
  • 400

application/json

  • "teams": [
    • {
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "leagueId": "string",
      • "leagueName": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "photoUrl": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "string",
      • "userRole": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "totalPages": 0,
  • "totalResults": 0
}

Users

Get current user

Returns or creates the user profile for the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/users/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "me": {
    • "appData": {
      • "defaultLeagueId": "string"
      },
    • "createdAt": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "firebaseUid": "string",
    • "id": "string",
    • "isEmailVerified": true,
    • "mfa": {
      • "useMfa": true,
      • "useMfaMethod": "string"
      },
    • "name": "string",
    • "plan": {
      • "active": true,
      • "activeFrom": "string",
      • "activeTo": "string",
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "features": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "string"
      },
    • "updatedAt": "string"
    },
  • "message": "string"
}

Create or get current user

Idempotently creates the user profile for the authenticated user (same as GET).

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/users/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "me": {
    • "appData": {
      • "defaultLeagueId": "string"
      },
    • "createdAt": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "firebaseUid": "string",

    • "isEmailVerified": true,
    • "mfa": {
      • "useMfa": true,
      • "useMfaMethod": "string"
      },
    • "name": "string",
    • "plan": {
      • "active": true,
      • "activeFrom": "string",
      • "activeTo": "string",
      • "createdAt": "string",
      • "features": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "id": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "string"
      },
    • "updatedAt": "string"
    },
  • "message": "string"
}

Get user plan

Returns the current subscription plan for the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/users/me/plan

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "plan": {
    • "active": true,
    • "activeFrom": "string",
    • "activeTo": "string",
    • "createdAt": "string",
    • "features": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "id": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "updatedAt": "string"
    }
}

Create subscription plan

Creates a new subscription plan linked to the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required

Plan details

active
boolean
activeFrom
string

RFC3339; defaults to now if empty

activeTo
string

RFC3339; omit for no expiry

features
Array of strings
firebaseUid
string
name
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/users/plan

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "active": true,
  • "activeFrom": "string",
  • "activeTo": "string",
  • "features": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "firebaseUid": "string",
  • "name": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "plan": {
    • "active": true,
    • "activeFrom": "string",
    • "activeTo": "string",
    • "createdAt": "string",
    • "features": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "id": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "updatedAt": "string"
    }
}

Delete subscription plan

Permanently removes a subscription plan by ID.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Plan ID (UUID)

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/users/plan/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": true,
  • "message": "string",
  • "plan": {
    • "active": true,
    • "activeFrom": "string",
    • "activeTo": "string",
    • "createdAt": "string",
    • "features": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "id": "string",
    • "name": "string",
    • "updatedAt": "string"
    }
}

Update subscription plan

Updates an existing subscription plan by ID.

Authorizations:
FirebaseAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Plan ID (UUID)

Request Body schema: application/json
required

Updated plan fields

active
boolean

pointer to distinguish false from absent

activeFrom
string
activeTo
string
features
Array of strings
name
string

Responses

https://api.jumpstoppivot.com/v1/users/plan/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "active": true,
  • "activeFrom": "string",
  • "activeTo": "string",
  • "features": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "name": "string"
}
